'''Ta-mara Greenly''' was one of two sisters of [[Tag Greenley/Legends|Tag Greenley]]. She, like her other sibling [[De-hoff Greenley|De-hoff]], dated [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]].

Lando had trouble double-booking them and Tag provided him with an alibi.

==Appearances==
*''[[Tag & Bink: Revenge of the Clone Menace]]'' {{1st}}
*[[Tag & Bink Are Dead 1|''Tag & Bink Are Dead'' 1]]
*[[Tag & Bink Are Dead 2|''Tag & Bink Are Dead'' 2]] {{1stm}}
